name: Command Tier — Multi-Location Operating System for Hospitality Groups
description: 10-step comprehensive demo of the Command tier built for multi-location bar groups, hospitality groups, and operators with 3+ venues.

steps.title: Welcome to the [BAR_NAME] Command Center
steps.annotation: This is the Command-tier view of [BAR_NAME] — every location, every revenue line, every alert in a single operating screen. Built for groups running 3+ venues who can't be at every bar every night.
steps.screen_hint: Capture the Command Center landing page with multi-location header and group-level KPIs visible.

steps.title: Multi-Location Switcher — All Your Bars, One Click Away
steps.annotation: Toggle between any of [BAR_NAME]'s venues instantly. Each bar keeps its own dashboard, its own staff, its own alerts — but you see them all from the same login. No more juggling 5 tabs.
steps.screen_hint: Show the location switcher dropdown with multiple venue names listed and the active venue highlighted.

steps.title: Cross-Venue Comparison Dashboard
steps.annotation: Side-by-side performance across every [BAR_NAME] location. Revenue per labor hour, void rate, A-player ratio, Golden Hours capture rate — ranked. You'll see immediately which venue is the model and which one needs a manager change.
steps.screen_hint: Zoom on the cross-venue comparison table with multiple locations ranked across key metrics.

steps.title: Executive Summary Report — Your Monday Morning Brief
steps.annotation: Every Monday at 7am, [BAR_NAME] gets a one-page executive summary across all venues — revenue, alerts, top wins, top problems, and the three actions that will move the needle this week. Your COO will have it in their inbox before they sit down.
steps.screen_hint: Show a sample executive summary PDF preview with the Monday-morning email header visible.

steps.title: API Access — CoreTAP Plugs Into Everything You Already Run
steps.annotation: Full REST and webhook API on Command tier. Pipe CoreTAP metrics into Looker, Sigma, Notion, your own data warehouse, or your CFO's dashboard. We don't fight your stack — we feed it.
steps.screen_hint: Highlight the API documentation page with sample endpoints listed and an API key generator visible.

steps.title: White-Label Option — Your Brand on Top of Our Engine
steps.annotation: For groups, franchises, and management companies: re-skin the entire CoreTAP UI with [BAR_NAME]'s brand. Your logo, your colors, your domain. CoreTAP becomes invisible — your operating platform becomes the product.
steps.screen_hint: Side-by-side mockup showing the standard CoreTAP UI vs a white-labeled version with a fictional group brand.

steps.title: Custom Alerts — Your Rules, Your Thresholds
steps.annotation: Command tier lets you define custom alerts across every venue. 'Notify me if any [BAR_NAME] location drops below 80% of forecasted revenue by 10pm.' 'Slack me if void rate at any bar crosses 4%.' Your operating playbook, automated.
steps.screen_hint: Show the Custom Alerts builder with a sample rule being constructed across multiple locations.

steps.title: Priority Support — A Human Within 4 Hours
steps.annotation: Command tier comes with priority support: dedicated Slack channel, 4-hour SLA, and a named CSM who knows [BAR_NAME] by name. When your POS hiccups on a Saturday at 11pm, we're already on it.
steps.screen_hint: Show the priority-support badge and a sample CSM profile card with response-time SLA visible.

steps.title: ROI Calculator — Your Payback Period in Real Numbers
steps.annotation: Plug in [BAR_NAME]'s number of venues and average monthly revenue. The calculator shows your projected month-one recovery, your annualized ROI, and your payback period — using benchmarks from groups your size already running CoreTAP Command.
steps.screen_hint: Interactive ROI calculator widget with sliders for venue count and avg revenue, payback period auto-calculating.

steps.title: Benchmark vs Houston Market & Book Your Enterprise Call
steps.annotation: [BAR_NAME] benchmarked against the Houston bar market: where you lead, where you trail, and the three plays that close the gap fastest. Book a 45-minute enterprise call and we'll walk you through your specific report and the Command-tier rollout plan.
steps.screen_hint: Closing popup with a benchmark visual (your bar vs market percentiles) and an enterprise-call Calendly booking widget.
